scripts.optimize: docker build -t wrap-dspy -f eval/dspy/Dockerfile . && docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)/eval/examples":/app/eval/examples -v "$(pwd)/eval/results":/app/eval/results -v "$(pwd)/eval/dspy":/app/eval/dspy -v "$(pwd)/eval/bridge.ts":/app/eval/bridge.ts -v "$(pwd)/src":/app/src --env-file eval/dspy/.env wrap-dspy && bunx biome format src/prompt.optimized.json --write
